title: SangriaCraftSMP Create
description: This modpack is a survival-focused SMP experience centered around the Create mod, enhanced with mods that expand automation, exploration, and quality of life, while maintaining performance and a balanced progression.
body: SangriaCraftSMP Create is a survival-focused SMP experience centered around the Create mod, enhanced with mods that expand automation, exploration, and quality of life, while maintaining performance and a balanced progression.
